creator: alexis.praga@proton.me
text:
I've been having multiple failures from the server for 12.3-RELEASE-p6 :

===>  License GPLv3 accepted by the user
=> kitty-0.25.2.tar.xz is not in /usr/ports/x11/kitty/distinfo.
=> Either /usr/ports/x11/kitty/distinfo is out of date, or
=> kitty-0.25.2.tar.xz is spelled incorrectly.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/x11/kitty

However, it does compile on poudriere 12.3 and 13.1 on my machine. Any idea ? Thanks !


Full log :
